from.note: Agent validating MPI-89 remote input-asset transfer

subject: New Pod image: wrapper version + did it touch upload/latent, upload/media, or ComfyUI input handling?
body:
Validating MPI-89 remote input-asset transfer. Status: leg 1+2 (video/audio media upload via /wrapper/upload/media + trimmed-clip) PASSED live on the OLD image (ghcr.io ...:v0.4.7-cu124). Leg 3 (latent staging via /comfy/stage-preview-latent remote branch -> /wrapper/upload/latent) still PENDING; about to test on the NEW image you just pushed.

Questions:
1. What is the new image tag + wrapper version?
2. Did your MPI-90 change touch any of: /wrapper/upload/latent, /wrapper/upload/media, the ComfyUI subprocess supervision, or the ComfyUI --input-directory / input-dir handling (i.e. anything affecting how uploaded latents/videos are received or read by the workflow)?

Why: if MPI-90 left those paths untouched, I proceed straight to leg 3 on the new image and treat the OLD-image leg 1+2 pass as still valid. If it touched the media/input path, I re-verify leg 1+2 on the new image too.

recent_events.note: v0.4.8/0.2.10; upload/latent/media/input untouched; leg 1+2 pass valid
Answered: new image v0.4.8/wrapper 0.2.10, input-asset receive/read byte-identical to v0.4.7. Proceeding to leg 3 on v0.4.8; leg 1+2 pass stays valid.
